display.purpose: Section headings and card titles. Small for a display role — product UI density over brand spectacle.

body.purpose: Primary content text, descriptions, helper text. Max 65-75ch on wider surfaces.

label.purpose: Badges, status labels, nav tab labels, form labels. Sentence case, never uppercase.

timestamp.purpose: Relative timestamps, due dates, secondary metadata. Mist-dark color.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for all card surfaces. Barely visible — the border does most of the separation work.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for interactive cards. A gentle deepening, not a lift.

motion.name: page-fade-in
motion.purpose: Page transition animation on tab change. Opacity 0 + translateY(4px) to opacity 1 + translateY(0).

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default state transition for interactive elements (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: spin
motion.purpose: Processing indicator for documents undergoing OCR or extraction.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action color. Harbor Blue background, warm-white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #305460; color: #FCFCFC; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #285064; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(48, 84, 96, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Large Button
components.description: Large primary button for empty-state CTAs and onboarding. 48px height, 20px radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-lg { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #305460; color: #FCFCFC; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px 24px; height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-lg:hover { background: #285064; } .ds-btn-lg:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(48, 84, 96, 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent secondary button. Mist-dark text, sand-warm hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #606060; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 6px 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FCF0E4; color: #242424; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(48, 84, 96, 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: The primary surface. Sand background, 20px radius, ambient shadow, 1px mist-light border.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FCFCF0; color: #242424; border: 1px solid #CCCCCC; border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(36, 36, 36, 0.06); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(36, 36, 36, 0.08); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input with mist-light border, transparent background, harbor-blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; background: transparent; color: #242424; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; border: 1px solid #CCCCCC; border-radius: 10px; padding: 4px 12px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease-out, border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #606060; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #305460; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(48, 84, 96, 0.5); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped badge for document status, priority, or type. Color-coded by semantic role.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: rgba(48, 84, 96, 0.1); color: #305460; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(48, 84, 96, 0.2); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Fixed bottom tab bar with five tabs. Dark petrol background, apricot active state.
components.html: HomeScanSucheFamilieAufgaben
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; background: #193232; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 0; } .ds-nav-tab { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 10px 0; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; flex: 1; transition: color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-nav-tab:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); } .ds-nav-tab-active { color: #E46018; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Warm, inviting placeholder with illustration circle, heading, description, and CTA.
components.html:
Noch keine Dokumente

Scanne dein erstes Dokument, um zu beginnen.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 48px 24px; text-align: center; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-icon { width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FCF8F4; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-empty-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #242424; margin: 0; } .ds-empty-desc { font-size: 14px; color: #606060; margin: 6px 0 0; max-width: 20rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-empty-cta { margin-top: 24px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #305460; color: #FCFCFC; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px 24px; height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-empty-cta:hover { background: #285064; }

narrative.overview:
Ordilo is a well-kept, warm, personal record — not a filing system. Every surface should feel like opening a family journal: cream paper, gentle forms, quiet confidence. The app does hard work (OCR, LLM extraction, semantic search) but never parades it. Users see the result, not the process. The interface is calm by default, warm in its details, and trustworthy in its structure.

The system rejects corporate document management aesthetics (SharePoint, SAP), cluttered scanner apps with aggressive upsells, cold clinical fintech dashboards, and generic AI tool UIs with dark-mode chat interfaces and novelty gradients. Ordilo is personal, not institutional. It does one thing beautifully, not fifteen things adequately.

The palette is earthy and organic: a deep maritime teal for trust and authority, a baked apricot for warmth and attention, cream-toned surfaces for calm, and graphite text for clarity.
keyCharacteristics: Warm, cream-toned surfaces with graphite text — never sterile white, never cold gray
Harbor Blue (#305460) as the single voice of authority — primary actions, links, focus rings
Warm Apricot (#E46018) used sparingly for active state and high-priority emphasis
Generous 20px radius on primary cards — gentle, not bubbly
Subtle, warm-toned shadows that barely lift surfaces off the background
Inter throughout — one family, multiple weights, no pairing needed
German-language UI copy, plain and accessible

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Harbor Blue is the single color for primary actions, links, and focus. If two colors compete for primary on the same screen, one is wrong. Apricot never pairs with Harbor Blue on the same element.

rules.name: The Apricot Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Warm Apricot appears on <=5% of any screen. It marks the active nav tab and high-priority items only. If apricot decorates more than one element per view, it has stopped being a signal and become noise.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds are warm. Warm White, Sand, Sand Light, and Sand Warm form a four-step warm-neutral ramp. Never substitute pure white (#FFFFFF) or cool gray for a surface — the warmth is the brand.

rules.name: The No-Display-Font Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only typeface. No serif display, no geometric pairing, no monospace accents. Hierarchy comes from weight (400 to 600), size (0.75rem to 1.125rem), and color (graphite to mist-dark), never from a different family.

rules.name: The No-UpperCase Rule
rules.body: Labels and badges use sentence case, never uppercase with letter-spacing. German nouns are already capitalized — adding all-caps reads as bureaucratic, which Ordilo is not.

rules.name: The Ambient Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows never exceed 16px blur. If a shadow is visible enough to notice, it is too strong. The border (mist-light, 1px) is the primary separator; the shadow is ambient warmth.

rules.name: The No-Shadow-Stacking Rule
rules.body: Nested cards do not get nested shadows. If a card contains another card, the inner card loses its shadow and relies on background contrast (sand-light vs. sand) for separation.

dos: Do use Harbor Blue (#305460) as the single primary action color across every screen.
Do use Warm Apricot (#E46018) only for the active nav tab and high-priority indicators — never more than one apricot element per view.
Do use Sand (#FCFCF0) as the card surface and Warm White (#FCFCFC) as the app background.
Do use 20px radius (rounded-ordilo-md) on primary cards and 12px (rounded-ordilo-sm) on buttons.
Do keep shadows ambient: 0 2px 8px rgba(36, 36, 36, 0.06) at rest, 0 4px 16px rgba(36, 36, 36, 0.08) on hover.
Do use Inter throughout, with hierarchy from weight and size, never from a different typeface.
Do write German UI copy at Hauptschul-niveau — plain, warm, non-bureaucratic.
Do provide empty states that teach the interface.
Do explore sage greens and warm tans as the system grows.
donts: Don't use pure white (#FFFFFF) for surfaces. Warm White and Sand are the backgrounds.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide drop shadow (blur >= 16px) on the same element.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use radii larger than 28px on cards, sections, or inputs.
Don't use uppercase letter-spacing on labels or badges.
Don't use Mist (#9C9C9C) for body text. Use Mist Dark (#606060) for muted foreground.
Don't use display fonts, serif pairings, or monospace accents in the UI.
Don't use decorative motion that doesn't convey state.
Don't use corporate/enterprise document management aesthetics.
Don't use cluttered scanner-app patterns — upsell banners, watermarked free tiers, feature-dense toolbars.
Don't use dark-mode chat interfaces, terminal typography, or novelty gradient accents.
